name: GitHub
description: Repo stats for any public GitHub repo: =GITHUB_STARS, =GITHUB_FORKS, =GITHUB_OPEN_ISSUES, =GITHUB_COMMITS_LAST_N_DAYS. Optional token unlocks higher rate limits + private repos.
author: GridOS

secrets.label: Personal access token
secrets.help: Without a token you get 60 requests/hour on public repos; with one you get 5000/hour and can read private repos you have access to.
